title: Rolling Into National Meatball Day
story: Every March 9, food lovers across America celebrate National Meatball Day by rolling up their sleeves and getting creative in the kitchen! Restaurants offer special meatball deals, from classic spaghetti and meatballs to Swedish meatballs with lingonberry sauce. Home cooks experiment with fun recipes like turkey meatballs, veggie meatballs, and even dessert meatballs made from cake mix. Social media fills with photos of perfectly round, juicy meatballs in every sauce imaginable. Some families host meatball-making contests to see who can roll the most perfectly shaped spheres, while others try to break records for the biggest meatball ever made!
activity_question: What do some families do to celebrate National Meatball Day?
bonus_fact: The world's largest meatball weighed over 1,300 pounds and was made in Italy!

title: Crab-solutely Delicious Day!
story: Chefs across America crack open fresh crab shells and scoop out sweet, tender meat to celebrate National Crabmeat Day on March 9! Restaurants serve up crab cakes, crab bisque, and buttery crab rolls. Home cooks try new recipes with this ocean treasure. Seafood lovers post photos of their crabby creations online, sharing tips for picking the best meat from claws and shells.
activity_question: What do restaurants commonly serve on National Crabmeat Day?
follow_up_question: What's your favorite way to eat seafood - with butter, in a sandwich, or in soup?

title: National Get Over It Day: Time to Move On!
story: Every March 9, people celebrate National Get Over It Day by letting go of grudges, bad moods, and annoying problems that have been bugging them. Friends remind each other to stop worrying about yesterday's mistakes or last week's drama. Some people write down their worries on paper and throw them away, while others simply take a deep breath and decide to focus on good things instead.
activity_question: What do some people do with their worries on National Get Over It Day?
activity_choices: Write them down and throw them away
Sing them loudly in the shower
activity_answer: Write them down and throw them away
follow_up_question: What's one thing you could 'get over' to feel happier today?

title: Panic Day: When Freaking Out is Totally Fine!
story: Every March 9, people celebrate Panic Day by letting themselves feel completely overwhelmed without any guilt! This quirky holiday gives everyone permission to admit when life feels too crazy. Some people share their biggest worries with friends, while others write down everything that's stressing them out. Many folks post funny memes about their daily chaos on social media. The best part? After acknowledging all that panic, people often feel much better and more relaxed!
activity_question: What do some people write down on Panic Day?
activity_choices: The names of all their pets
follow_up_question: What helps you feel better when you're worried about something?

title: Spinning Into World DJ Day
story: DJs around the globe drop their hottest beats on March 9 for World DJ Day! This awesome celebration honors the talented artists who mix music and keep dance floors packed. DJs share special playlists on social media, radio stations feature local mixing masters, and clubs throw epic parties with guest performers. Many DJs livestream their sets online so fans everywhere can tune in and dance along. Music schools often host DJ workshops where kids can learn to scratch records and blend songs like the pros. It's the perfect day to appreciate how DJs transform ordinary songs into unforgettable musical journeys that make people move and groove!
activity_question: What do DJs often do on World DJ Day to share their music with fans everywhere?
activity_choices: Hide their music in secret locations
follow_up_question: What's your favorite type of music to dance to?

title: Plastic Fantastic: National Barbie Day
story: Pink takes over the world every March 9 when fans celebrate National Barbie Day! People dress up in bright pink outfits, share photos of their favorite Barbie dolls on social media, and host themed parties. Some collectors show off rare vintage Barbies, while others create fun photo shoots with their dolls. Kids play dress-up games and watch Barbie movies together. Many fans visit toy stores to hunt for new Barbie releases or accessories. It's a day when being "plastic fantastic" is totally cool, and everyone can embrace their inner fashionista!
activity_question: What color do people especially wear on National Barbie Day?
follow_up_question: What would your dream Barbie career be and why?
